issues.detail: The skill only covers happy path scenarios and lacks error handling or edge case guidance.
The skill contains redundant explanatory text, leading to unnecessary verbosity.

scenarios.name: Scaffold Ionic React tabs app with iOS and Android
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses exact CLI sequence: ionic start ... tabs --type=react, ionic cap add ios/android, ionic cap sync, then ionic cap open; baseline tends to use npx @ionic/cli or skip cap sync.

scenarios.name: Capacitor Camera photo helper
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports Camera/CameraResultType/CameraSource from @capacitor/camera, calls getPhoto with resultType Uri and source Prompt, returns image.webPath; baseline often uses CameraResultType.Base64 or omits the Prompt source.
